'''Abyssissa''' was the sixth and outermost [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Geonosis system/Legends|Geonosis system]]. It orbited the star [[Ea/Legends|Ea]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-03-24 -->''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''
*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]''
